_comment: TEST DATA — a synthetic PRContext for the Beancount sandbox customer, matching packages/agents PRContext. Fed to POST /review by run-review.mjs. The diff introduces the catalogued defects so a real review has something to find.
title: Add expense search + paginated listing and a category report
description: Adds GET /expenses (paginated), GET /expenses/search, and GET /reports/summary for the new dashboard. First pass — feedback welcome.
ci_logs: FLAKY: app/api/__tests__/reports.test.ts > 'this month's expenses roll up under the current month bucket' failed on CI run #482 (passed on re-run). AssertionError: 5 !== 6
